name: Nacho Cheese Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt provolone in the top of a double boiler over boiling water.
2. Add American cheese and stir until cream is incorporated.
3. Add cream cheese and stir until all ingredients are melted.
4. Remove from heat and whisk in seasonings and yellow food coloring.
5. Serve warm with crackers, chips, or vegetables.
